name: LSP MCP (code intelligence)
description: Installs language servers (TypeScript, Python) and a Bun-based HTTP MCP service that exposes LSP-backed code intelligence (definitions, references, hover, diagnostics, symbols) to MCP clients such as Claude Code.

languages.description: Comma-separated languages to enable. Supported: typescript, python.

port.description: Port for the HTTP MCP service.

autoRegister.description: Merge an entry into the workspace .mcp.json so MCP clients auto-discover the server. Set false if claude-manager (or another tool) owns .mcp.json.
